_publications._publicationTitle: Gene expression analysis identifies potential biomarkers of neurofibromatosis type 1 including adrenomedullin.

_contextSnippet: The mean ADM serum concentration in controls was 0.07 ng/mL (n = 25), significantly lower (P < 0.0001) than serum ADM levels in NF1 patients...mean ADM concentration in NF1 patients with MPNSTs had significantly higher ADM levels when compared with NF1 patients with pNF (mean ADM concentration of 0.24 versus 0.18 ng/mL; P = 0.03)
details: Successfully detected significantly elevated ADM levels in NF1 patients (0.18 ng/mL) versus controls (0.07 ng/mL, P < 0.0001) and higher levels in MPNST patients (0.24 ng/mL) versus pNF patients (0.18 ng/mL, P = 0.03)
